recipes.title: Eggless Cake Sponge
ingredients: Milk - Fill the Milkmaid tin or 250 ml
steps: First pass all Dry ingredients through a sieve like Maida, Baking Powder and Baking Soda.
Kept them aside in a bowl.
Take White Butter and whisk it with powdered sugar until sugar is dissolved.
Once dissolved and butter melts add Milkmaid.
Mix all wet ingredients.
Add Vanilla Essence to wet ingredients.
Now comes the important step.
Line your cake tin (you will get two cakes with above recipe).
Line it with butter paper or ghee + maida combo.
Start Oven to pre heat at 180 Degrees.
Next we need to fold Dry ingredients into wet ingredients bowl.
By folding I mean mix slowly in only One Direction.
Keep hollow part of spoon always facing the direction.
Add Dry ingredients a Tsp at a time and fold then next tsp.
Once you feel mixture is harder to mix add Milk (in parts).
Continue to add All Dry ingredients to wet mix bowl.
By the end of the process you should have-
An airy mixture with Besan chilla like consistency or bit stiffer.
Pour mixture in cake tins (Only half way).
Bake in Center for 35 to 40 mins.
Once baked (check with knife).
Take it out, let it cool a bit and then remove from Cake tin.
Eat piping hot!!

recipes.title: Rice Kheer
steps: Wash rice and cook in a little water until soft.
Add milk and simmer, stirring occasionally.
Add sugar and cardamom.
Garnish with nuts and serve warm/chilled.
